channel.title: Stockwatch - Key Events
channel.description: Real-time corporate announcements, deals, and financial results.

item.title: [AAL] A-1 Ltd Revises FY26 Integrated Filing Due to Error
item.description:
A-1 Ltd has revised its integrated financial filing for the quarter and year ended March 31, 2026, due to a typographical error in the standalone and consolidated statement of segment revenue, results, assets, and liabilities. The revised filing is in compliance with SERI Circular No. SEBI/HO/CFD/CFD-PoD-2/CIR/P/2024/185 dated December 31, 2024. The corrected information is available on the company's website.

  • A-1 Ltd files revised integrated financial results for FY26.
  • Revision addresses typographical errors in segment reporting.
  • Filing complies with SERI circular SEBI/HO/CFD/CFD-PoD-2/CIR/P/2024/185.
  • Auditor's report confirms true and fair view after revision.

📄 Read Official Filing (PDF)


Company: A-1 Acid Ltd | Category: Quarterly Result

item.title: [CROMPTON] Crompton Greaves Declares ₹3 Dividend; Record Date July 24, 2026
item.description:
Crompton Greaves Consumer Electricals Ltd's Board of Directors has recommended a dividend of ₹3 per equity share (150% of face value of ₹2) for the financial year ended March 31, 2026, subject to shareholder approval at the upcoming AGM on August 7, 2026. The record date for determining dividend entitlement is set for Friday, July 24, 2026. The dividend, if approved, will be paid on or after August 7, 2026, but within 30 days of the AGM. The board also approved the re-appointment of Statutory Auditors and other auditors, and amendments to various policies.

  • Crompton Greaves recommends a dividend of ₹3 per share for FY26.
  • Record date for dividend entitlement is set as July 24, 2026.
  • AGM to be held on August 7, 2026, for shareholder approval.
  • Re-appointment of M/s. MSKA & Associates LLP as Statutory Auditors approved.
  • Amendments to key policies including Code of Conduct and Risk Management Policy approved.

📄 Read Official Filing (PDF)


Company: Crompton Greaves Consumer Electricals Ltd | Category: Dividend

item.title: [MANINFRA] Man Infraconstruction Declares ₹0.72 Interim Dividend
item.description:
Man Infraconstruction Ltd's board declared an interim dividend of ₹0.72 per equity share (36%) on 40,36,66,505 equity shares with a face value of ₹2 each for the financial year 2026-27. The record date for determining shareholder entitlement is May 19, 2026, and the dividend will be paid on June 05, 2026. The board also approved the audited financial results for the quarter and year ended March 31, 2026, and material related party transactions, subject to shareholder approval.

  • Interim dividend of ₹0.72 per share declared.
  • Record date fixed as May 19, 2026.
  • Dividend payment date is June 05, 2026.
  • Audited financial results for FY26 approved.
  • Material related party transactions approved, subject to shareholder approval.

📄 Read Official Filing (PDF)


Company: MAN INFRACONSTRUCTION LTD. | Category: Dividend

item.title: [DEL] Dhanashree Electronics Delisted from CSE Effective May 13, 2026
item.description:
Dhanashree Electronics Ltd. announced that it has been voluntarily delisted from the Calcutta Stock Exchange (CSE) effective May 13, 2026, following approval from CSE under SEBI (Delisting of Equity Shares) Regulations, 2021. The company's shares (Code 14039) are now delisted from the official list of CSE.

  • Dhanashree Electronics delisted from CSE effective May 13, 2026.
  • Delisting approved by CSE under SEBI regulations.
  • Company's shares (Code 14039) removed from CSE official list.

📄 Read Official Filing (PDF)


Company: Dhanashree Electronics Ltd | Category: Delisting

item.title: [CROMPTON] Crompton Greaves Appoints Internal, Cost, and Tax Auditors
item.description:
Crompton Greaves Consumer Electricals Ltd's Board of Directors, in a meeting held on May 13, 2026, approved the re-appointment of various auditors for the financial year 2026-27. This includes the re-appointment of M/s. Ashwin Solanki & Associates as Cost Auditors, M/s. Grant Thornton Bharat LLP as Internal Auditors, and M/s. Sharp & Tannan as Tax Auditors. The board also approved the re-appointment of M/s. MSKA & Associates LLP as the Statutory Auditors for a second term of 5 years, subject to member approval at the upcoming AGM. Additionally, the board recommended a dividend of ₹3 per equity share for FY26, also subject to member approval.

  • Re-appointment of M/s. MSKA & Associates LLP as Statutory Auditors for 5 years, subject to AGM approval.
  • M/s. Ashwin Solanki & Associates re-appointed as Cost Auditors for FY 2026-27.
  • M/s. Grant Thornton Bharat LLP re-appointed as Internal Auditors for FY 2026-27.
  • M/s. Sharp & Tannan re-appointed as Tax Auditors for FY 2026-27.
  • Board recommends a dividend of ₹3 per equity share (150% of face value) for FY26, subject to AGM approval.

📄 Read Official Filing (PDF)


Company: Crompton Greaves Consumer Electricals Ltd | Category: Auditor

item.title: [EXPLEOSOL] Expleo Solutions: Audited FY26 Results Approved
item.description:
🔥 Trending

Expleo Solutions Ltd. has announced the approval of its audited standalone and consolidated financial results for the quarter and financial year ended March 31, 2026. The board also approved the re-appointment of M/s. Sundaram & Srinivasan as Internal Auditor for two years and an investment of ₹2.10 Cr in Expleo Solutions Gift IFSC Limited, making it a wholly-owned subsidiary. Deloitte Haskins & Sells issued an audit report with an unmodified opinion on the financial results.

  • Audited standalone and consolidated financial results for FY26 approved.
  • Sundaram & Srinivasan re-appointed as Internal Auditor for 2 years.
  • ₹2.10 Cr investment approved for Expleo Solutions Gift IFSC Limited.
  • Deloitte Haskins & Sells issued an unmodified audit opinion.

📄 Read Official Filing (PDF)


Company: Expleo Solutions Ltd | Category: Quarterly Result

item.title: [BHARTIARTL] Bharti Airtel: FY26 Results & ₹24/Share Dividend
item.description:
Bharti Airtel Ltd announced its financial results for Q4 and the year ended March 31, 2026. The Board recommended a final dividend of ₹24 per fully paid-up equity share of face value ₹5 each, and ₹6 per partly paid-up equity share of face value ₹5 each (paid-up value ₹1.25 per share). Revenue from operations for the quarter ended March 31, 2026, was ₹553,832 million and ₹2,109,728 million for the year ended March 31, 2026.

  • Bharti Airtel's Board recommends a final dividend of ₹24 per fully paid-up share.
  • Q4 2026 revenue from operations reached ₹553,832 million.
  • FY26 revenue from operations totaled ₹2,109,728 million.
  • Dividend payout is subject to shareholder approval at the AGM.
  • Record date for dividend entitlement will be announced in due course.

📄 Read Official Filing (PDF)


Company: BHARTI AIRTEL LTD. | Category: Quarterly Result

item.title: [AKSCHEM] AksharChem Board Meeting on May 21, 2026 to Consider Audited Results
item.description:
Aksharchem India Ltd. has scheduled a Board of Directors meeting on May 21, 2026, to consider, approve, and take on record the audited financial results for the quarter and financial year ended March 31, 2026. The board will also consider recommending a final dividend on equity shares for the financial year 2025-26. The trading window for dealing in the company's securities has been closed since April 1, 2026, and will reopen 48 hours after the financial results are declared.

  • AksharChem board meeting scheduled for May 21, 2026.
  • Audited financial results for FY26 to be considered.
  • Final dividend for FY26 may be recommended.
  • Trading window closed since April 1, 2026.
  • Trading window reopens 48 hours post results declaration.

📄 Read Official Filing (PDF)


Company: AKSHARCHEM (INDIA) LTD.-$ | Category: Board Meeting

item.title: [VENTIVE] Ventive Hospitality: KPIs for FY26 Certified
item.description:
Ventive Hospitality Ltd. disclosed its Key Performance Indicators (KPIs) for the financial year ended March 31, 2026, in compliance with SEBI regulations. The KPIs, along with comparative data from the previous two financial years, are included in Annexure-A and Annexure-B. M/s. G S K A & Co., Chartered Accountants, have certified these KPIs. The company had raised funds through an IPO in December 2024. The agreed-upon procedures were performed as per Standard on Related Services (SRS) 4400 and the ICAI's Technical Guide.

  • Ventive Hospitality discloses FY26 KPIs as per SEBI regulations.
  • GSKA & Co. certified the KPIs for FY26, FY25, and FY24.
  • KPIs are detailed in Annexure-A and Annexure-B.
  • The company raised funds through an IPO in December 2024.
  • Report confirms KPIs were correctly extracted from financial statements.

📄 Read Official Filing (PDF)


Company: Ventive Hospitality Ltd | Category: Regulatory

item.title: [KANCOTEA] Kanco Tea Board Meeting on May 29, 2026 to Approve Audited Financial Results
item.description:
Kanco Tea & Industries Ltd has scheduled a Board of Directors meeting on May 29, 2026, to consider and approve the Annual Audited Financial Results (standalone and consolidated) for the quarter and financial year ended March 31, 2026.

  • Board meeting scheduled for May 29, 2026.
  • Agenda includes approval of annual audited financial results.
  • Results are for the quarter and year ended March 31, 2026.
  • Both standalone and consolidated results will be considered.

📄 Read Official Filing (PDF)


Company: Kanco Tea & Industries Ltd | Category: Board Meeting
